holders said Chipotle failed to disclose growing unhappiness among =0Acusto=
mers with inconsistent portion sizes for its burritos and rice bowls.=0A=0A=

=0Anews, you see a story that is like =E2=80=9CChipotle doesn=E2=80=99t put=
 enough meat in =0Aburritos,=E2=80=9D and you would like to turn that news =
item into several million =0Adollars for yourself. How do you do it=3F=0A=
=0AThe obvious victims of Chipotle=E2=80=99s actions here are the customers=

 skimpy scoop of =0Ameat. There are, perhaps, tens of millions of these peo=
ple. What are their =0Adamages=3F What sort of compensation can they sue fo=

=E2=80=A6 50 cents=3F Okay so tens of millions of people =0Atimes 50 cents =
is certainly millions of dollars; if you can bring a class =0Aaction lawsui=
t on their behalf, maybe you can get millions of dollars of =0Adamages and =
keep 25% for yourself. It=E2=80=99s something.=0A=0AIt=E2=80=99s not much, =
